mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qlist q JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no WHERE q.status = 'Y'
AND q.category = #{category}
AND (q.title LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%' OR q.content LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%')
AND q.title LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%'
AND q.content LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%'
AND m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%'

SELECT q.*, m.nickname AS writer, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.post_no = q.q_no AND r.post_board = 'Q' AND r.status = 'Y') AS replyCount FROM qlist q JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no WHERE q.status = 'Y'
AND q.category = #{category}
AND (q.title LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%' OR q.content LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%')
AND q.title LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%'
AND q.content LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%'
AND m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%'
ORDER BY q.create_date DESC
OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT q.*, m.nickname AS writer FROM qlist q JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no WHERE q.q_no = #{qNo} AND q.status = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE QLIST SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, CATEGORY = #{category}, VISIBILITY = #{visibility}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE Q_NO = #{qNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_QNO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO QLIST ( Q_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, STATUS, MEMBER_NO, CATEGORY, VISIBILITY ) VALUES ( #{qNo}, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{memberNo}, #{category}, #{visibility} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QLIST WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT Q.*, M.ID, Q.CREATE_DATE AS createDate FROM QLIST Q JOIN MEMBER M ON Q.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE Q.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND Q.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY Q.Q_NO DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY
